skills.name: Daily Article

skills.description: Top HN stories filtered by keywords relevant to your interests

skills.description: Top Hacker News stories filtered by interests

skills.description: Find the one paper you should read today from arXiv and Semantic Scholar

skills.name: Tweet Digest
skills.description: Aggregate and summarize tweets from tracked accounts

skills.name: List Digest
skills.description: Top tweets from tracked X lists in the past 24 hours

skills.name: Research Brief
skills.description: Deep dive on a topic combining web search, papers, and synthesis

skills.description: Exhaustive multi-source synthesis on any topic — 30-50 sources, 3000-5000 word analyst-grade report

skills.name: Fetch Tweets
skills.description: Search X/Twitter for tweets by keyword, username, or both

skills.name: Search Academic Papers
skills.description: Search for recent academic papers on topics of interest and save a summary

skills.name: Reddit Digest
skills.description: Fetch and summarize top Reddit posts from tracked subreddits

skills.name: Security Digest
skills.description: Monitor recent security advisories from the GitHub Advisory Database for tracked ecosystems

skills.name: PR Review

skills.name: GitHub Monitor
skills.description: Watch repos for stale PRs, new issues, and new releases

skills.name: GitHub Issues
skills.description: Check all your repos for new open issues in the last 24 hours

skills.name: GitHub Trending
skills.description: Top 10 trending repos on GitHub right now

skills.name: Issue Triage
skills.description: Label and prioritize new GitHub issues on watched repos

skills.name: Changelog
skills.description: Generate a changelog from recent commits across watched repos

skills.name: Code Health
skills.description: Weekly report on TODOs, dead code, and test coverage gaps

skills.name: Feature Builder
skills.description: Build new features from GitHub issues or improve the agent

skills.name: Build Skill
skills.description: Design and build a new reusable skill

skills.name: Search Skills
skills.description: Search the open agent skills ecosystem for useful skills to install

skills.name: Token Alert
skills.description: Notify on price or volume anomalies for tracked tokens

skills.name: Token Movers
skills.description: Top movers, losers, and trending coins from CoinGecko

skills.name: Trending Coins
skills.description: Top trending and most searched coins on CoinGecko in the last 24 hours

skills.name: Wallet Digest
skills.description: Summarize recent wallet activity across tracked addresses

skills.name: On-Chain Monitor
skills.description: Monitor blockchain addresses and contracts for notable activity

skills.name: DeFi Monitor

skills.name: DeFi Overview

skills.name: Token Pick
skills.description: One token recommendation and one prediction market pick based on live data

skills.name: Reply Maker
skills.description: Generate two reply options for 5 tweets from tracked X accounts or topics

skills.name: Refresh X
skills.description: Fetch a tracked X/Twitter account's latest tweets and save the gist to memory

skills.name: Morning Brief
skills.description: Aggregated daily briefing — digests, priorities, and what's ahead

skills.name: Daily Routine
skills.description: Morning briefing combining token movers, tweet roundup, paper pick, GitHub issues, and HN digest

skills.name: Heartbeat
skills.description: Proactive ambient check — surface anything worth attention

skills.name: Memory Flush

skills.description: Review recent activity, consolidate memory, and prune stale entries

skills.name: Weekly Review
skills.description: Synthesize the week's logs into a structured retrospective

skills.description: Weekly audit of what Aeon did, what failed, and what to improve

skills.name: Skill Health

skills.name: Goal Tracker

skills.name: Startup Idea
